content.problemStatement:
You are given two integer sequences A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč and B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BM‚Äč. For any two sequences U1,U2,‚Ä¶,UpU_1, U_2, \ldots, U_pU1‚Äč,U2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Up‚Äč and V1,V2,‚Ä¶,VqV_1, V_2, \ldots, V_qV1‚Äč,V2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Vq‚Äč, we define
Score(U,V)=‚ąĎi=1p‚ąĎj=1qUi‚čÖVj‚ÄČ.Score(U, V) = \sum_{i=1}^p \sum_{j=1}^q  U_i \cdot V_j \,.Score(U,V)=‚ąĎi=1p‚Äč‚ąĎj=1q‚ÄčUi‚Äč‚čÖVj‚Äč.

You should process QQQ queries of three types:


111 LLL RRR XXX: Add XXX to each of the elements AL,AL+1,‚Ä¶,ARA_L, A_{L+1}, \ldots, A_RAL‚Äč,AL+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AR‚Äč.
222 LLL RRR XXX: Add XXX to each of the elements BL,BL+1,‚Ä¶,BRB_L, B_{L+1}, \ldots, B_RBL‚Äč,BL+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BR‚Äč.
333: Print Score(A,B)Score(A, B)Score(A,B) modulo 998,244,353998,244,353998,244,353.

Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two integers, NNN and MMM, denoting the length of AAA and BBB respectively.
The second line contains NNN integers, elements of AAA.
The third line contains MMM integers, elements of BBB.
The next line will contain an integer, QQQ, number of queries.
Each of the next QQQ lines will contain one of 333 kinds of updates as mentioned in the statement.

It‚Äôs guaranteed that each update is a valid update operation.



Output Format
For each query of the third type, print a single line containing one integer - the answer to that query.
